item.title: Reset cakey foundation for a fresh finish
item.description: Learn a simple reset for cakey foundation to bring the skin back to life and refresh your makeup finish.

media:content.media:title: Reset cakey foundation for a fresh finish
media:content.media:description: Learn a simple reset for cakey foundation to bring the skin back to life and refresh your makeup finish.

item.title: Glam Eyes for Hooded Lids
item.description: Learn how to create beautiful glam eyes with this makeup tutorial inspired by droopy eyelids. Follow simple tips to define and lift the eyes.

media:content.media:title: Glam Eyes for Hooded Lids
media:content.media:description: Learn how to create beautiful glam eyes with this makeup tutorial inspired by droopy eyelids. Follow simple tips to define and lift the eyes.
